name: Dart King – Ultimate VR Darts Experience

reviews.review_title: WTF?  how difficult can this be?
reviews.review_description: There are so many different dart games already available, how hard can it be to make yours work?  I have at least three others and they all work fine.  In this game you can throw as hard as you can and the darts still only fly about three feet and the fall to the ground.  You have to be standing directly in front of the board or there's no way to hit it, and even at that, sometimes they just fall to the ground anyways. Why did you release this game? It was NO where near being ready to be played.
Horrible game and I don't like that you can't try the game like a trial to see if it's even worth buying it or not
